chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1047 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on CMA No.741/2026 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 3. For hearing of CMA No.4338/2025 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 04.02.2026 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate a/w petitioner ************** Urgent application is allowed. The matter is antedated from 28.04.2026 to today. Today, learned counsel for the petitioner is present and states that he does not wish to pursue the instant constitutional petition. The petitioner is present in person and affirms the said statement. Accordingly, the instant constitutional petition is dismissed as not pressed, along with the listed application. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
